title: Athlete Schema Notes
content: The athletes table stores athlete_id, name, position, and team. It is the shared dimension table for session, GPS, and wellness analytics.

title: Session Schema Notes
content: The sessions table stores session_id, athlete_id, session_date, duration_minutes, and session_type. The session_date column is text, so analytics queries must convert it with TO_DATE before filtering by date.

title: GPS Metrics Schema Notes
content: The gps_metrics table stores total_distance, sprint_distance, and high_intensity_efforts by session_id. It joins to athletes through sessions rather than directly through athlete_id.

title: Wellness Schema Notes
content: The wellness table stores athlete_id, date, fatigue_score, and sleep_score. The date column is text and should be converted with TO_DATE when applying time windows.
